enabled.label: Enable AniList
enabled.description: Master on/off for AniList sync/matching. Optional; default off.

access_token.label: Access Token
access_token.description: Paste a personal AniList API access token. Create one on the AniList developer settings page and paste it here — Phlix does not run an AniList OAuth flow. Required for list sync and writing progress back to AniList.

username.label: AniList Username
username.description: Your AniList username. Used to pull your watch/read lists during sync.

sync_enabled.label: Enable list sync
sync_enabled.description: Sync watched/progress with your AniList list. Optional; default on.

sync_interval_minutes.label: Sync interval (minutes)
sync_interval_minutes.description: How often to sync with AniList. Optional; default 60.

auto_match.label: Auto-match
auto_match.description: Automatically match anime to AniList entries using external IDs. Optional; default on.
